metadata.title: Corrupted Data孤独死
tracklist: 02 Cadu Tenório - People Only Have Substance Within the Memories of Other People. and That's Why There Were All Kinds of Mes. There Weren't a Lot of Mes Per Se, I Was Just Inside All Sorts of People, That's All.
03 Cadu Tenório - Even If We Were to Become Separated Let's Both Think of Each Other.
04 Cadu Tenório - Love Certainly Is a Strange Emotion, Now Isn't It, Lain.
05 Cadu Tenório - Punpun, Remember When We Were in Grade School and You Wrote That Essay About Wanting to Research Outer Space?
07 Cadu Tenório - You Told Me Once to Forget the Past, Cause It Doesn't Matter, But You're the One Still Tied to the Past, Spike.

09 Cadu Tenório - I Always Believed That Everyone in This World Was Far Nicer and Smarter Than Me. That no Matter How Unlikeable They Seemed to Be, They Still Had a Good Conscience and Had Justifiable Circumstances For
10 Cadu Tenório - I Said "see You Later" Thinking the Back of My Mind That We Would Never See Each Other Again.
13 Cadu Tenório - It's Human Nature to Mindlessly Pursue Beauty and to Be Toyed with and to Destroy.
15 Cadu Tenório - It'd Be Nice If Everything Else, Would Just Vanish Into Nothingness...
17 Cadu Tenório - The Rain Continued on Endlessly as If It Had Forgotten How to Stop.
